I've removed the unused `pyyaml` runtime dependency. Since `cbfkit` does not import `pyyaml` in its source code, the dependency was likely added for development tools (like pre-commit or devcontainer extensions) that manage their own environments or are external to the package runtime. Removing `pyyaml` from `project.dependencies` reduces the installation footprint and potential conflicts. (#114)
